scripts.dev: pnpm exec wait-on ../../packages/contracts/dist/index.js && pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm exec tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.prisma:generate: node scripts/prepare-prisma-cli.cjs && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate: node scripts/prepare-prisma-cli.cjs && pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:seed: pnpm --filter @repo/contracts build && node scripts/run-with-optional-dotenv.cjs .env node prisma/seed.cjs
